Package de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po

Interface InfFlowPO

All Superinterfaces:
ProofOblInput
All Known Subinterfaces:
InfFlowCompositePO, InfFlowLeafPO
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractInfFlowPO, BlockExecutionPO, InfFlowContractPO, LoopInvExecutionPO, SymbolicExecutionPO
public interface InfFlowPO extends ProofOblInput

    Get the information flow proof obligation variables (set of four sets of proof obligation variables necessary for information flow proofs) for the "leaf" (i.e., child of child of ..) information flow proof obligation.

  • Method Details

    • getLeafIFVars

      IFProofObligationVars getLeafIFVars()
      Get the information flow proof obligation variables (set of four sets of proof obligation variables necessary for information flow proofs) for the "leaf" (i.e., child of child of ..) information flow proof obligation.
      Returns:
      the information flow proof obligation variables.
